isolation.testingTool: Shell commands (bash/zsh) + code review with grep/rg

keyFindings: skillName is 'worker' for regular work, 'checker' for attest work
loadSkillFile searches for skills/cogent/<name>/SKILL.md in multiple roots
Loaded content is included in briefing under worker_contract.skill_markdown

steps.expected: Function falls back when skill file not found
steps.observed: Line 2114: return fallbackSkillContent(name) called when no skill file found in any root directory

steps.expected: Function provides hardcoded content without error
steps.observed: Lines 2045-2073: fallbackSkillContent returns hardcoded contract instructions for 'checker' and default (worker), never returns error

steps.expected: Fallback content contains valid briefing instructions
steps.observed: Checker fallback: 9 bullet points with review, attestation requirements. Worker fallback: 11 bullet points with commit, update, testing requirements

steps.expected: loadSkillFile signature returns string, not error
steps.observed: Line 2075: func (s *Service) loadSkillFile(name string) string - no error return type, cannot fail

steps.expected: Unit test explicitly tests missing file scenario
steps.observed: TestLoadSkillFileUsesRepoSkillAndFallback 'missing' subtest (lines 2712-2731) changes to empty temp dir and verifies loadSkillFile returns fallbackSkillContent
Command completed successfully [Process exited with code 0]

keyFindings: loadSkillFile returns fallbackSkillContent(name) when no file found (line 2114)
fallbackSkillContent has no error path - always returns valid string content
Fallback provides complete contract instructions for both worker and checker
Function signature prevents error propagation: returns string, not (string, error)
Unit test TestLoadSkillFileUsesRepoSkillAndFallback explicitly validates fallback behavior

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-SKILL-003: CompileWorkerBriefing successfully loads skill files via loadSkillFile, which searches multiple root directories for skills/cogent/<name>/SKILL.md and includes content in worker_contract.skill_markdown. VAL-SKILL-004: When skill files are missing, loadSkillFile gracefully falls back to fallbackSkillContent providing hardcoded contract instructions without error. Both assertions verified through code review, unit test analysis, and successful go build.
